true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks an enemy.
Depending on the unique effect applied to the caster, activates one of the following effects:

Ume Ichirin: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> after attacking.

Sakura, Chiru: Attacks all enemies. Always attacks with <color=#28d9ed>elemental advantage</color>.

Attacks an enemy.

Sakura, Chiru: Attacks all enemies. Always attacks with <color=#28d9ed>elemental advantage</color>.

Sakura, Chiru: Attacks all enemies. Always attacks with <color=#28d9ed>elemental advantage</color>.

true_desc_levels.5:
Attacks an enemy.
Depending on the unique effect applied to the caster, activates one of the following effects:

Ume Ichirin: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> after attacking.

Sakura, Chiru: Attacks all enemies. Always attacks with <color=#28d9ed>elemental advantage</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp:
敵単体にダメージを与える。
自分に【梅一輪】または【桜散る】がある場合、次の効果が発動する。

【梅一輪】:敵単体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。

 【桜散る】:敵全体 にダメージを与える。このスキルは敵の属性を無視し、<color=#28d9ed>有利属性</color>の攻撃判定でダメージを与える。

 【桜散る】:敵全体 にダメージを与える。このスキルは敵の属性を無視し、<color=#28d9ed>有利属性</color>の攻撃判定でダメージを与える。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
적을 공격합니다.
보유한 고유 효과에 따라 이하의 효과 중 하나가 적용됩니다.

【우메이치린】 : 적을 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color>의 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.

【사쿠라치루】 : 적 전체를 공격합니다. 항상 <color=#28d9ed>유리한 상성</color>으로 적용됩니다.

攻击敌人。
根据附带的固有效果触发以下效果之一。

【一朵梅花】:攻击敌人。攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

【樱花凋零】:攻击全体敌人。总是以<color=#28d9ed>优势属性</color>施展。

true_desc_levels.1: (Passive Effect)Increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> and increases damage dealt to bosses.\nWhen using <color=#28d9ed>Mikazuki Form 1: Bloom</color>, increases WG damage dealt to enemies by <color=#28d9ed>1</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: (Passive Effect)Increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> and increases damage dealt to bosses.\nWhen using <color=#28d9ed>Mikazuki Form 1: Bloom</color>, increases WG damage dealt to enemies by <color=#28d9ed>1</color>.

true_desc_levels.5: (Passive Effect)Increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> and increases damage dealt to bosses.\nWhen using <color=#28d9ed>Mikazuki Form 1: Bloom</color>, increases WG damage dealt to enemies by <color=#28d9ed>2</color>.

true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks an enemy, then grants an extra turn.

Before attacking, if the target's Health is less than or equal to <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Ume Ichirin</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> and increases damage dealt.

If the target's Health is greater than <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Sakura, Chiru</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> and generates <color=#28d9ed>5</color> <color=#28d9ed>Chain Points</color>.
true_desc_levels.2:
Attacks an enemy, then grants an extra turn.

Before attacking, if the target's Health is less than or equal to <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Ume Ichirin</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> and increases damage dealt.

If the target's Health is greater than <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Sakura, Chiru</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> and generates <color=#28d9ed>5</color> <color=#28d9ed>Chain Points</color>.
true_desc_levels.3:
Attacks an enemy, then grants an extra turn.

Before attacking, if the target's Health is less than or equal to <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Ume Ichirin</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> and increases damage dealt.

If the target's Health is greater than <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Sakura, Chiru</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> and generates <color=#28d9ed>5</color> <color=#28d9ed>Chain Points</color>.
true_desc_levels.4:
Attacks an enemy, then grants an extra turn.

Before attacking, if the target's Health is less than or equal to <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Ume Ichirin</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> and increases damage dealt.

If the target's Health is greater than <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Sakura, Chiru</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> and generates <color=#28d9ed>5</color> <color=#28d9ed>Chain Points</color>.
true_desc_levels.5:
Attacks an enemy, then grants an extra turn.

Before attacking, if the target's Health is less than or equal to <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Ume Ichirin</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> and increases damage dealt.

If the target's Health is greater than <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>, grants the <color=#28d9ed>Sakura, Chiru</color> effect for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> and generates <color=#28d9ed>5</color> <color=#28d9ed>Chain Points</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp:
敵単体にダメージを与え、追加ターンを獲得する。

攻撃前に対象の残りHPが<color=#28d9ed>90%</color>以下の場合、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【梅一輪】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、与えるダメージがUPする。

対象の残りHPが<color=#28d9ed>90%</color>を超える場合、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【桜散る】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、<color=#28d9ed>CP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>5</color>獲得する。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
적을 공격 후 추가 턴을 획득합니다.

공격 전 대상의 현재 체력이 <color=#28d9ed>90%</color> 이하라면 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>우메이치린</color> 효과를 획득하고, 피해량이 증가합니다.

대상의 현재 체력이 <color=#28d9ed>90%</color>를 초과한다면 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>사쿠라치루</color> 효과를 획득하고, <color=#28d9ed>CP</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>5</color> 회복합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh:
攻击敌人后获得额外回合。

攻击前,若目标的当前生命值在<color=#28d9ed>90%</color>以下,则获得<color=#28d9ed>一朵梅花</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使伤害量
提升。

若目标的当前生命值高于<color=#28d9ed>90%</color>,则获得<color=#28d9ed>樱花凋零</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并恢复<color=#28d9ed>5</color>点<color=#28d9ed>CP</color>。
